page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong performance characteristics across multiple compute and memory workloads. The instance achieves top 25% results in both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests, as well as in Passmark CPU, encryption, and physics benchmarks. Memory performance is particularly notable, with the Passmark memory score ranking in the top 10% and small-block cached read bandwidth placing in the top 25%. Large-block uncached read and write memory bandwidth, along with single-threaded compression and static web serving throughput, perform in the average middle 50% tier.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.g8a.12xlarge offers a highly resource-dense profile for general-purpose enterprise workloads. It is well-suited for multi-threaded decompression tasks, database operations, and high-throughput key-value stores like Redis, where it demonstrates strong benchmark efficiency. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it a cost-efficient choice for compute-heavy and memory-intensive applications that do not require local NVMe drives or hardware acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 x86_64 processor with 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz. Equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, it maintains a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance features no local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Performance benchmarks place this instance in the top 25% for both single-core and multi-core CPU execution, with its Passmark memory score reaching the top 10% tier. It is highly efficient for multi-threaded decompression, database operations, and Redis caching, making it an optimal choice for balanced enterprise workloads requiring dedicated compute resources without local storage overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 48 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 192 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering top-tier memory and strong CPU benchmark performance.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC platform delivering balanced compute and top-tier memory performance for enterprise databases and caching.

192.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
